Class OpenApi20HeaderImpl

java.lang.Object
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.NodeImpl
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.openapi.v2x.v20.OpenApi20HeaderImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
Extensible, Node, OpenApiExtensible, OpenApiHeader, OpenApi2xExtensible, OpenApi2xHeader, OpenApi20Extensible, OpenApi20Header, Visitable
public class OpenApi20HeaderImpl extends NodeImpl implements OpenApi20Header
